/usr/lib/ccache/gcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautoware_internal_metric_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libautoware_internal_metric_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/autoware_internal_metric_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autoware_internal_metric_msgs/msg/detail/metric__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autoware_internal_metric_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autoware_internal_metric_msgs/msg/detail/metric_array__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
